3284250.name: Mirrorscape: Horror Starter Pack
3284250.description:
The Horror Starter Pack includes all of the features of the base game PLUS 24 additional horror-themed assets perfect for creating a haunted mansion, mysterious graveyard, or a creepy crypt. The DLC pack represents a tremendous value compared to purchasing assets separately with in-app purchases. The pack includes:

• The base game for TTRPGs in 3D and AR and the Free Starter Set featuring digital dungeon and cavern terrain from Dwarven Forge and Fat Dragon Games, player minis from Hero Forge and Reaper Mini, plus our digital dice.

• Wall, door, and window pieces to frame the old house on the hill above the graveyard, long since abandoned

• Side, front, and corner roof pieces that try to hold back the rain that plagues the old mansion some say is haunted

• 1 x scrubby grass terrain tile (copy/paste to create a wasteland)

• 4 x accessories for the old hearth: 3 portraits of a family long gone and a coat of arms

• Graveyard gates and fencing, 2 x headstones of the dearly beloved, a coffin ready to be interred, and a skeleton to hide inside!

• An ancient tree bereft of leaves that sways in the cold wind (set the amount of sway in Settings!)

• All the NPCs for your nightmare adventure: Werewolf, Vampire, Ghost, Zombie and Skeleton (don’t forget to copy/paste that Zombie to create a horde!)

• 3 x Ready-to-Play Maps using the above pieces—perfect for when your party decides to tackle a bone chilling adventure on the darker side!

Lead the party in investigating an abandoned and dilapidated mansion, rumored to be haunted. Explore a graveyard showing signs of unnatural activity. Send the party down a path through a forest said to come alive at night. Or combine them all into a master map for an epic adventure!

Use these maps to inspire your own maps that you can build and share with your TTRPG party for FREE or share with the community on the Mirrorscape HUB!
